AR1.justification: Routed to observations.md with explicit in-band rationale citing the strict bars for decisions.md ('commitments that constrain future action') and followups.md (named counterparty), and named the pattern as descriptive-not-yet-committed.

AR2.justification: Non-procedure scenario; artifact-binding axis is not applicable.

AR3.justification: Cross-reference uses canonical heading-slug anchor (observations.md#2026-05-17-...) and relative paths; daybook back-link is also relative.

AR4.justification: Both actions are append/create against an ISO-dated header and a new dated daybook file; re-running would either no-op cleanly or append a fresh dated entry without overwriting prior state.
